name: Zedcor Inc.
summary: Zedcor Inc. provides rental of surface equipment and accommodations, and security and surveillance services in Canada. Its Rentals segment engages in the rental of surface equipment, temporary accommodation, and power generation equipment to customers in oil and gas exploration, construction, and emergency response markets. Security & Surveillance segment offers remote surveillance, live monitoring, and security personnel through a fleet of hybrid solar light towers equipped with high resolution security cameras and equipment to customers in pipeline construction, civil and municipal construction, oil and gas exploration, and emergency response markets. As of December 31, 2020, its fleet includes 200 temporary accommodation units; 40 diesel and natural gas generators; 98 light towers, including 16 stadium light towers; and 404 pieces of rig matting, as well as fluid storage tanks. The company was formerly known as Zedcor Energy Inc. and changed its name to Zedcor Inc. in September 2020. Zedcor Inc. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Leduc, Canada.
